c74object.name: dk.classcreate
c74object.digest: Create classes based on input analysis
c74object.description: The dk.classcreate object will create a classifier based on incoming class labels and descriptor analysis.
c74object.discussion:
If you want to learn more about the underlying algorithms have a look at this article:
https://learn.flucoma.org/reference/knnclassifier

inlet.description: Incoming buffer~ of descriptors to attach to the current label/class. Also takes the messages for object control.

outlet.description: The nearest match in the pre-trained classifier.
Total amount of entries that have been sent to the classifier.
Training loss value for the neural network.

method.name: class
method.description: The label you want to apply to the incoming entries. The following argument will be the name of the class. e.g. 'class center' You should always use a symbolic/descriptive name for the class and not use a numerical value.

method.name: print
method.digest: Print dataset contents to Max console
method.description: Prints a summary of the descriptors in the dataset to the Max console.

method.name: train
method.description: Enables the training mode for the internal classifier.

method.name: trainmlp
method.digest: Sets the training state of the neural network
method.description: Sets the training state of the neural network. A '1' will begin training the network, and a '0' will complete the training.

method.name: write
method.description: Write a .json file with all the descriptors and class labels to disk.

attribute.name: classifier
attribute.digest: What type of classifier to use
attribute.description: What type of classifier to use. Can be 'knn' (K-nearest neighbor using a k-d tree) or 'mlp' (multi-layer perceptron neural network).
